headline: Target (TGT) Raises Full Year Sales Outlook After Broad Based Rebound
summary: Target (NYSE:TGT) has raised its full-year net sales growth outlook for fiscal 2026. Management cites a rebound in traffic-led sales across all six merchandise categories. The improvement spans in-store and digital channels and reaches diverse customer demographics. This guidance update reflects broader momentum that extends beyond recent branded partnerships. For investors watching large U.S. retailers, Target sits at the intersection of mass merchandise, discretionary spending, and...
